name: Salmon Fish Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and flake the fish into a bowl.
2. Mix in the potato and cheese.
3. Dust your hands with flour, then divide the salmon mixture into eight equal portions.
4. Shape each portion into patties, dusting with flour to prevent sticking.
5. Brush each fish patty with beaten egg and coat with breadcrumbs.
6. Chill the fish cakes for one hour before frying in heated oil.
7. Drain on kitchen paper before serving with salad or peas.
Makes 8. Approx. 300 kcals per serving
